title: KaistyCraft
description: The official KaistyCraft modpack, featuring Create, Spectrum and many others
body:
This is the official modpack for the KaistyCraft community server (yet you can use it outside of it).

# Mods
There's something for everyone in this modpack. Go adventure and find out about the secrets of [Spectrum](https://modrinth.com/mod/3rc31Hgo), or build a new machine, using [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/LNytGWDc)'s rotational power. This is accompanied by a ton of QoL improvements and performance mods, making the experience as smooth and pleasant as possible.

## Main Content Mods
* [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/XxWD5pD3) – storing items as data
* [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/LNytGWDc) – motion-based tech mod
  * [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/kU1G12Nn) – electric energy + QoL improvements for Create
  * [Create Mechanical Spawner](https://modrinth.com/mod/T1hmeGi9) – making spawners for Create
  * [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/GmjmRQ0A) – Create integration for Farmer's Delight
  * [Create: Power Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/wPQ6GgFE) – chunk loader for Create
* [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/R2OftAxM) – more food
* [Spectrum](https://modrinth.com/mod/3rc31Hgo) – progression and exploration-based magic mod

## Smaller Content Mods
* [Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/SaCpeal4) – sleeping bags to sleep without changing your spawn point
* [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/pJmCFF0p) – decoration
* [Map Atlases](https://modrinth.com/mod/4hwXMFif) –  atlases for a minimap and a world map
* [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) – an in-game voice chat

## Other Mods
There are also many quality-of-life and performance mods in this modpack. If you know a good one, it's most likely in here. And if it isn't, there is probably a reason for that. I used all my energy to hand-craft the best possible experience and carefully picked every mod one by one. If you want to see the full mod list, you can download the modpack and look it up in your launcher.
